title: Grocery Ordering/Delivery * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Grocery Ordering/Delivery * Older Adults 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF MADRAS COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY HOME FOOD DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Delivers food to homebound individuals unable to visit the food pantry. Delivery is within an 11 mile radius of Madras. 370 SW Culver Highway Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities who are homebound Hours: 3rd Thursday of the month by appointment Email (541) 325-1747 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY HOME DELIVERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides delivery of food items, including canned goods, dairy, grains, produce, and meat. Household items such as diapers and wipes, pet supplies, laundry detergent, cleaning supplies, and paper products may be available when supply allows. Preordering is available online in multiple languages, and navigators can assist those who need help with the ordering process. 3223 SE 92nd Avenue Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Age 60 and older or age 18 and older with disabilities Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 427-8741 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MADRAS COMMUNITY FOOD PANTRY HOME FOOD DELIVERY PORTLAND OPEN BIBLE COMMUNITY PANTRY HOME DELIVERY
